name: shop_no_ads
description: A no-ads badge: a plump knitted round burst badge, the letters "ADS" in exactly that spelling on it with a bold red diagonal slash across, framed by yarn-texture ring.
prompt_extra: the red slash and ring sit on top of the gold ADS lettering; readable at 64px

variants.name: warm
variants.prompt_extra: slightly warmer, cozier tones and a touch more craft detail

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: slightly simpler, more minimal composition with bolder shapes
